# programs.eza

<!-- AUTO-GENERATED by scripts/nix-options.sh. Do not edit by hand. -->

All options under `programs.eza`.

| Option | Type | Description |
| --- | --- | --- |
| `programs.eza.colors` | `one of <null>, "auto", "always", "never"` | Use terminal colors in output ({option}`--color` argument). |
| `programs.eza.enable` | `boolean` | Whether to enable eza, a modern replacement for {command}`ls`. |
| `programs.eza.enableBashIntegration` | `boolean` | Whether to enable Bash integration. |
| `programs.eza.enableFishIntegration` | `boolean` | Whether to enable Fish integration. |
| `programs.eza.enableIonIntegration` | `boolean` | Whether to enable Ion integration. |
| `programs.eza.enableNushellIntegration` | `boolean` | Whether to enable Nushell integration. |
| `programs.eza.enableZshIntegration` | `boolean` | Whether to enable Zsh integration. |
| `programs.eza.extraOptions` | `list of string` | Extra command line options passed to eza. |
| `programs.eza.git` | `boolean` | List each file's Git status if tracked or ignored ({option}`--git` argument). |
| `programs.eza.icons` | `one of <null>, true, false, "auto", "always", "never"` | Display icons next to file names ({option}`--icons` argument). Note, the support for Boolean values is deprecated. Setting this option to `true` corresponds to `--icons=auto`. |
| `programs.eza.package` | `null or package` | The eza package to use. |
| `programs.eza.theme` | `YAML 1.1 value` | Written to {file}`$XDG_CONFIG_HOME/eza/theme.yml` See <https://github.com/eza-community/eza#custom-themes> |
